# Preface {.unnumbered}

::: {.callout-note}
This is the companion website for the article "How to conduct behavioural experiments online" by Matthew Warburton and Jonathan Tsay. 
If you have found this resource helpful for designing and implementing your online experiment, please consider citing it in your research:

`Warburton, M., Tsay, J.S. How to conduct behavioural experiments online. Nature Human Behaviour (2026). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41562-026-02465-w`
:::

This resource provides an overview tips and tricks to maximize the benefits of conduting online behavioral research.
